overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city intersection and sidewalk, featuring elevated industrial walkways, modern architecture with orange and gray facades, and scattered urban debris. The overcast lighting and cool desaturated color palette create a dystopian atmosphere characteristic of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: camera moves forward from behind red and white construction barriers into the open street
approaching the center of the intersection with elevated walkways overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the urban intersection, navigating around construction debris and barriers

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barriers with graffiti markings
multi-story building with orange and white facade and large windows
tall palm trees lining the street in front of the building
industrial metal walkway structure connecting buildings overhead
tall gray concrete parking structure under construction with exposed floors

segments.scene_description: The segment begins behind construction barriers and moves into a wide urban intersection. An orange and white mixed-use building with palm trees stands prominently on the left, while an unfinished concrete structure rises on the right. Industrial elevated walkways span overhead against an overcast sky as the camera walks forward through the asphalt street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered intersection area beneath elevated walkways

events.description: passing under the elevated walkway structure, entering a more enclosed space with artificial lighting
turning right onto the sidewalk next to the building with yellow entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the intersection and executing a right turn onto the sidewalk near a distinctive yellow building entrance

notable_agents.action: two individuals standing near the yellow building entrance, one appearing to smoke

entered.detail: building with bright yellow facade and glass doors at ground level
accumulated garbage bags and scattered debris on the street corner
yellow sedan parked on the side of the road
gray concrete pavement with red painted curb

segments.scene_description: Moving under the elevated walkway, the scene becomes more enclosed with mixed natural and artificial lighting. The camera passes piles of trash and a yellow parked car before turning right onto a sidewalk beside a building with a bright yellow entrance. Two NPCs stand near the entrance as the camera approaches the corner.

events.description: transitioning from asphalt street to concrete sidewalk next to building wall
passing close to NPCs standing against the wall, temporarily blocking side view

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk, passing NPCs standing against the graffiti-covered concrete wall

notable_agents.action: two men standing against the wall, one in a dark suit and one in casual wear
woman in white top standing near the building corner looking at device

entered.detail: concrete building wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
green metal railings separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow concrete sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered building wall. The camera passes several NPCs standing against the wall while metal railings line the right side separating the walkway from the street. The yellow building entrance is now visible in the distance behind as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with holographic advertisements and distant megastructures

events.description: large holographic billboards become visible in the distance, adding neon lighting to the scene
approaching the corner where the sidewalk meets the crosswalk, view opens up

agents.ego_description: walking toward the corner and observing the distant cityscape with large holographic displays and unique architecture

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: large glowing pink and blue holographic advertisement floating above distant buildings
massive building with a distinctive architectural design resembling a face or mask
elevated roadway or monorail track crossing the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens up as the camera approaches a street corner. Large holographic billboards glow in the distance above a distinctive building with a face-like structure. The camera passes a walking NPC and approaches metal railings at the corner, with the unfinished concrete building coming back into view on the right as the environment transitions to a more open intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, industrial urban intersection into the enclosed corridors of a cyberpunk sidewalk before opening back up to a holographic city vista. It begins behind construction barriers, moving across an asphalt street flanked by an orange mixed-use building and an unfinished concrete structure under a network of elevated walkways. As the camera passes beneath these walkways, the environment becomes more confined, shifting past piles of trash and a parked yellow car before turning right toward a bright yellow building entrance. The scene then narrows onto a concrete sidewalk lined with graffiti-covered walls and metal railings, passing several stationary NPCs as the yellow entrance recedes into the distance. Finally, the view expands at a street corner where glowing holographic billboards and a face-like architectural structure emerge against the skyline, with the unfinished concrete building reappearing on the right.
